name: Update basket item quantities

requestModel.items: array of { basketItemId: int, quantity: int }

targetRestContract.notes: IndexModel.OnPostUpdate first fetches the basket by buyerId (via GetOrCreateBasketForUser) to resolve basketId, then passes a Dict<string,int> of basketItemId→quantity to SetQuantities. The REST target can accept basketId directly as a path param. Items with quantity=0 are deleted; items not included in the request body are left unchanged.

notes: Sets quantities for the specified basket items only — items in the basket but absent from the request body are untouched.
Items set to quantity=0 are removed from the basket via Basket.RemoveEmptyItems(), which deletes those BasketItems rows.
If the basket does not exist, returns Result<Basket>.NotFound() — the REST target should return 404.
BasketItem.SetQuantity enforces Guard.Against.OutOfRange(quantity, 0, int.MaxValue) — negative quantities throw an exception.
